'''Plo Smarx''' was a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] working for [[Hydrospeare Corporation]].<ref name="AIR" />

The leader of [[Design Team Beta]], Dr. Smarx worked in several projects to develop aquatic military technology for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="AIR" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Dr. Smarx was arrested, accused of sedition and espionage. Dr. [[Tolum Harous]] replaced Smarx as leader of Design Team Beta.<ref name="AIR" />
